title: Centro delays major bus route overhauls, will address concerns raised by riders
summary: Centro transit authority has delayed major bus route overhauls originally scheduled for early 2027, citing a need to address concerns raised by riders. The delay represents a shift in implementation timeline for what was announced as a significant service redesign.

political_signal.description: Rider concerns have prompted Centro to delay implementation of major service changes, suggesting effective constituent engagement or potential public opposition to the proposed route modifications.
